purpose: Expose the same source data through multiple operational lenses without fragmenting state.

devExtremePrimitives.role: Host view controls, filters, and saved-view commands.

validationRules: Keep filters and selection state intentionally synchronized or intentionally independent; do not leave it implicit.
Use clear labels for view modes because each view changes task affordances.

useWhen: Users edit, filter, sort, compare, or bulk-select records.
Date, time, recurrence, or resource scheduling is central.
Dependencies, duration, start/end dates, or phase overlap matter.
Status lanes, manual ordering, or compact object summaries matter more than columns.
Users need trend, distribution, comparison, or rollup analysis.

validationRules: Do not add a view if it cannot preserve the user's core workflow.
Use a single source dataset where possible and derive view-specific projections from it.
Prefer view-specific empty states that explain why the view has no data.
